title: Mocking External Services Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on mocking third-party APIs and services.

questions.question: Regarding testing, what is 'Mocking' as external service?
options: To replace a third-party service, like an API, with a controlled mock version during a test run

questions.question: Which of these is a key benefit of mocking an external service within your project's unit tests?
options: It increases test stability and performance by removing dependency on unstable or slow external systems
It makes your local machine faster
It deletes old commits by mistake
Its only possible for SQL repositories
